title: Get Results
description: Retrieve scraped TripAdvisor restaurant listings with ratings, reviews, and contact information

content.introduction: Retrieve restaurant listings scraped from TripAdvisor search results. Each result contains comprehensive restaurant data including ratings, review counts, price ranges, contact information, location coordinates, menu links, and Michelin status indicators.

resultFields.title: Result Fields
resultFields.content: Each result object contains the following restaurant listing data:

fields.description: Unique identifier for this result record
Object type, always "result"
Hash ID of the squid that produced this result
Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped
Name of the restaurant
Complete address as listed on TripAdvisor
Latitude coordinate of the restaurant
Longitude coordinate of the restaurant
Contact phone number if listed
Contact email address if scraped
Official website URL of the restaurant
Full URL to the restaurant's TripAdvisor page
Average rating score (1.0-5.0)
Total number of reviews the restaurant has received
Price range indicator
URL of the restaurant's main image or thumbnail
URL to the restaurant's menu on TripAdvisor
True if the business profile is claimed by the owner
True if the restaurant has a Michelin distinction
TripAdvisor's internal identifier for the restaurant
ISO timestamp when the listing was fetched
Native numeric ID matching the id field
Reserved for function-specific metadata

ratingSystem.title: TripAdvisor Rating System
ratingSystem.content: TripAdvisor uses a 5-point rating scale. The `score` field contains the average rating, while `ratings` contains the total number of reviews. Higher-rated restaurants with more reviews indicate consistent quality.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.content: Results are paginated. Use the `next` and `previous` URLs in the response to navigate through pages, or use `page` and `page_size` query parameters.

parameters.name: squid
parameters.description: The squid hash ID to get results from

parameters.name: run
parameters.description: Filter results by specific run hash ID

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 100, max: 1000)

proTips.content: Use the is_michelin field to filter for Michelin-starred or Michelin-recognized restaurants for premium dining data.
The price field uses currency symbols to indicate price ranges. Single symbol (e.g., €) indicates budget-friendly, while multiple symbols (€€-€€€) indicate higher price points.

seo.title: Get Results - TripAdvisor Restaurants Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Retrieve scraped TripAdvisor restaurant listings including ratings, reviews, price ranges, contact details, and Michelin status.
